title: jurinea moschus
intro: Jurinea moschus, also known as Sweet Bugloss or Musk Jurinea, is a plant species in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and has been traditionally employed to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Jurinea moschus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe digestive issues, as well as its use in skin care and wound healing. Herbal preparations of Jurinea moschus typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's roots or flowers, which can be used to make teas, tonics, or salves.
